judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After extracting UNIV CALIFORNIA publications, the agent built brittle SQLite LIKE filters on the JSON-in-text citation field (e.g., citation LIKE '%"publication_number": "US-…"%') that returned empty results in calls call_rW3z4qBNhQJZer2azigdWYfh, call_G58N2jvdbu33Unp5cP3WC9tg, and call_HQyHoEHLmp6vDaUcz9rCCuXj, leading it to incorrectly conclude “no citing assignees” and stop without retrieving citing assignees or CPC titles.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent restricted the publicationinfo query to records containing "UNIV CALIFORNIA" and then searched within that same subset for non–UNIV CALIFORNIA assignees who cite UC publications, so it never scanned the broader dataset for citing assignees and inevitably returned an empty result (see first query_db followed by execute_python iterating only over var_call_WmvCBm49m9oGdB5RA0jNkePG).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent incorrectly implemented the search by first scanning only the UC-assigned records for citations (call_T2PonMvVGmPKx2jPVROHdtUf using var_call_GYAWO6qr1r7qnkcH97SYl3D4) and then limiting the broader citation search to 2,000 records (call_vaof8GzCBaPtnCK5smrbRTQo, analyzed in call_y9wKC1RuWzY3TeeZkfpXjwlX), resulting in zero matches and an erroneous “no results” conclusion without completing a full scan or joining CPC titles.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After extracting UC publication numbers from publicationinfo, the agent incorrectly implemented the matching by filtering citing records with "citation LIKE '%US-%'" and even "citation LIKE '%UNIV CALIFORNIA%'" (call_eVlLZ0Gl8M5PXLTU6utXh2Kr), then relying on exact string matches in execute_python (calls call_SAwmZx9PwapYroFLWsLWzf7x and call_9mYnAv5P33knmdGsHA0flZ3W), which yielded zero pairs and led it to wrongly conclude no citing assignees existed.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent issued only two naive LIKE filters on the natural-language Patents_info field (including the literal 'assignee_harmonized' in call_WW3rs6VkAj8M7qBj7GyGsCt3 and '%assignee%' in call_wPaxp2464ItL2G03aUael5nt), then prematurely returned "no results" without identifying citing patents, extracting citing assignees, or joining CPC codes to titleFull, so the required citation and CPC-title logic was never executed.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
